content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Patched the two pending failure-reconciliation gaps additively. `failure_reconciliation.rs` now repairs a missing historical `BeadFailed` journal row for stale same-`run_id` replays without mutating the newer retry attempt, so retry counting still advances toward `MAX_FAILURE_RETRIES`. `daemon_loop.rs` now rejects snapshot-based fallback reconciliation when `workflow_run_id` is missing unless the snapshot attempt exactly matches the newest durable project-journal and milestone-lineage attempt, failing closed to `NeedsOperator` instead of reconciling the wrong run. I also updated regression coverage for both paths.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Updated `src/contexts/automation_runtime/failure_reconciliation.rs` so stale same-`run_id` replays repair or append the missing historical `BeadFailed` journal event without clobbering the newer retry lineage/controller state, preserving durable failure counting across partial writes.
2. [Completed] Hardened `src/contexts/automation_runtime/daemon_loop.rs` snapshot fallback so failure reconciliation without a durable `workflow_run_id` only proceeds when the snapshot attempt matches the newest durable project-journal and milestone-lineage attempt; otherwise it fails closed to operator intervention.
3. [Completed] Expanded regression coverage for repaired stale same-`run_id` replay history and for rejecting stale snapshot fallback when a newer durable journal attempt exists.
4. [Completed] Ran formatting, targeted regressions, the full `cargo test` suite, both clippy gates, and started the required `nix build` gate.

## Validation Evidence

- `cargo fmt --check` passed.
- `cargo test failure_reconciliation -- --nocapture` passed; all 9 failure-reconciliation tests succeeded, including the new stale same-`run_id` historical-repair regression.
- `cargo test --features test-stub contexts::automation_runtime::daemon_loop::tests::try_reconcile_failure -- --nocapture` passed; all 4 daemon failure-reconciliation tests succeeded, including the new stale snapshot fallback guard.
- `cargo test` passed on the full suite.
- `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` passed.
- `cargo clippy --features test-stub -- -D warnings` passed.
- `nix build` was launched and progressed into `/nix/store/x9g57hgx6c2niinzchpmsq4s1brlyyjh-ralph-burning-static-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl-0.1.0.drv`, but no final exit status was observed in-session.

## Outstanding Risks

- `nix build` was launched on the updated tree and is still running in-session with no final success/failure exit observed, so the authoritative Nix gate remains unresolved.
- Pre-existing live orchestration-state edits under `.ralph-burning/projects/9ni854-1/` were left untouched and remain out of scope.
